title: So Eco Long Handle Shower Pouf - Soft Loofah with Easy-Grip Handle for Hard-to-Reach Areas, Exfoliates & Creates a Rich Lather, Vegan & Cruelty-Free, Plastic-Free Packaging

features: LONG, EASY-TO-GRIP HANDLE - The extended, ergonomic handle allows you to comfortably reach your back and other hard-to-reach areas, allowing for a more convenient shower routine.
GENTLE EXFOLIATION - Soft fibres help buff away dead skin cells, leaving your skin smoother, refreshed, and revitalised.
RICH, LUXURIOUS LATHER - Designed to create a generous foam with less shower gel, saving product while enhancing your cleanse.
VEGAN & CRUELTY-FREE - Made entirely from non-animal materials and never tested on animals, certified by PETA.
GIVING BACK TO NATURE - So Eco plants 1 tree for every 100 products sold, helping to restore forests and support a greener planet.
description: Product Description Clean every hard-to-reach area using the So Eco Long Handle Shower Pouf. The easy to grip handle allows you access to every part of your body, leaving you feeling refreshed and cleansed. The soft loofa at the end makes for a luxurious wash, helping the soap to lather much more effectively. This shower essential also features a hanging loop for you to hang straight back up to dry after usage. Directions Wet the shower pouf, apply soap, and use it to clean your body. Rinse thoroughly after use and hang it up to dry. Safety Warning Always rinse and hang to dry after use. Allow to dry completely between uses to prevent bacterial growth. See more
